title: sorbus commixta f. pilosa
intro: Sorbus commixta f. pilosa, also known as the Chinese mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sorbus commixta f. pilosa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically harvested and dried to make teas, infusions, or capsules, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
